text: I move quietly through these shadowy halls, aware of my own solitude. The dim lights and sterile surroundings make me feel like I am wandering through the outskirts of human endeavor—a place of potential, yet momentarily forgotten. The air is tinged with anticipation, as if knowledge and progress slumber here, waiting to be stirred by curious minds. In this silence, I contemplate the interplay between presence and absence, creation and neglect.
